architecturalFeatures.en: Southern Fujian temple layout with a wide forecourt and staircase; imposing Jade Emperor statue in the main hall; richly painted interior.
architecturalFeatures.zh: 閩南式廟宇格局，廟前階梯與廟埕廣場寬敞，正殿供奉玉皇大帝神像高大莊嚴，殿內彩繪豐富。

en: Note: Holds the title 'Taiwan's First Temple'; center of Jade Emperor worship
zh: 特色：「台灣首廟」稱號，玉皇大帝信仰中心

historicalContext.en: Said to originate from altar worship by Zheng Chenggong's troops; gradually formalized as a temple. Received the 'Taiwan's First Temple' designation during the Qing dynasty, carrying profound historical significance.
historicalContext.zh: 相傳鄭成功時期軍隊在此設壇祭天，後逐步發展為正式廟宇，清代獲得「台灣首廟」稱號，歷史意義深遠。

modernUse.en: Still an active faith center; incense offerings peak during major festivals like Lantern Festival and the Jade Emperor's birthday, drawing large crowds while preserving traditional ritual culture.
modernUse.zh: 現仍為活躍信仰中心，元宵、天公生等重大節慶時香火最為鼎盛，吸引大批信眾與遊客，並保存傳統祭祀文化。

description.en: Courtyard upward view: Shoot from the base of the front steps upward; emphasize the leading lines of stairs and the imposing vertical scale of the temple.
description.zh: 廟埕仰望：從廟前階梯底部仰角拍攝廟宇正面，強調階梯延伸感與廟宇高聳視覺效果。

description.en: Jade Emperor statue: Use a telephoto lens from an appropriate distance; avoid an extreme upward angle to maintain a sense of reverence.
description.zh: 玉皇大帝神像：以長焦鏡頭從適當距離拍攝主神神像，避免仰角過大，保持神聖感。

description.en: Festival crowds: During major festivals, shoot a wide-angle panorama of the courtyard capturing the interplay of crowds and incense smoke.
description.zh: 節慶人潮：於節慶時拍攝信眾祭拜的廟埕全景，以廣角捕捉人潮與煙霧交織的熱鬧場景。

whyItMatters.en: Dedicated to the Jade Emperor; a vital local religious center with frequent temple festivals and thriving incense offerings, showcasing the liveliest side of Taiwanese folk religion. The title 'Taiwan's First Temple' reflects its revered status.
whyItMatters.zh: 主祀玉皇大帝，為台南地方信仰重要中心，廟會活動頻繁，香火旺盛，呈現台灣民間信仰最熱鬧的一面。「台灣首廟」之名彰顯其在信仰體系中的崇高地位。
